selectionPolicy: Police/state violence: Wikipedia unarmed African Americans killed by law enforcement; dual corroboration Guardian The Counted + Washington Post Fatal Force; curated historical cases.
Racial terror: SPLC Civil Rights Memorial / The Forgotten, NAACP/EJI-documented cases, Wikipedia lynching list rows marked African American.
Deduped by lowercase name + year. Context phrases are memorial labels, not legal findings.
Nat Turner included as state_execution (executed after rebellion), not framed as a lynching victim.
